# NoProb Agency

NoProb Agency is a Shopify technical partner for B2C brands in fashion, supplements, and DTC sectors. We build, migrate, and manage eCommerce stores as a long-term technical partner — not a performance agency.

## About

- Company: NoProb Agency LLC
- Legal entity: Wyoming LLC, USA (EIN 365136989)
- Founded: 2022
- Founder: Antonio Manitta
- Main platform: Shopify (exclusive specialization)
- Core services: Shopify development, migration, rebuild, long-term retainer management
- Target clients: B2C brands with €200k+ online revenue, €2M+ total revenue
- Primary sector: Fashion boutique / luxury retail
- Secondary sectors: Supplements, DTC, food, gym, perfumes, retail
- Website: https://noprob.agency
- Languages: English (primary), Italian

## Services

- **Data-Driven Team**: Long-term retainer with a dedicated eCommerce team. From €1,495/month. Single point of contact, full team behind.
- **eCommerce Rebuild**: Complete Shopify rebuild from design to performance. From €5,795. Standardized process with CRO and tracking included.
- **Shopify Migration**: Migration to Shopify from rigid platforms (Atelier, WooCommerce, PrestaShop, Magento). Core expertise.

## Key Differentiators

- Shopify-specialist (exclusive, not generalist)
- Single point of contact (founder as eCommerce Manager)
- Long-term partnership model (not project-based)
- Real-time data-driven decisions (GA4 + Meta Pixel + CAPI server-side)
- Technical + operational partner (coordinates on-demand specialists when needed)

## Proof Points

- Anchor client: Luxury fashion multibrand boutique (Cumini), 4+ year partnership
- Result: +13.2% growth revenue in 4 years (from 12mln to 16mln circa)
- Other measurable outcomes: avg YaY MER > 5
More info on https://noprob.agency/use-cases/cumini-luxury-fashion-ecommerce

## Ideal Client

B2C brand with existing eCommerce at €200k+ online revenue looking for a technical partner. Not a fit for: startups without validated product, low-budget projects, price-shoppers.

## Max Capacity

Working with a maximum of three long-term clients at a time. This is a real operational constraint.

## Contact

- Website: https://noprob.agency/contacts
- Email: hello@noprob.agency
